LocalFirmwareBuildStore.sourceSignature: class LocalFirmwareBuildStore { importManifest(selectedManifestPath: string): Promise<ImportedLocalFirmwareBuild>; reopenTarget(targetValue: LocalCustomFirmwareTarget): Promise<ImportedLocalFirmwareBuild>; readVerified(imported: ImportedLocalFirmwareBuild): Promise<Uint8Array>; openVerified(imported: ImportedLocalFirmwareBuild): Promise<VerifiedFirmwareArtifact> }

LocalFirmwareBuildRuntime.sourceSignature: export interface LocalFirmwareBuildRuntime { now(): Date; randomUuid(): string; }

ImportedLocalFirmwareBuild.sourceSignature: export interface ImportedLocalFirmwareBuild { readonly manifest: LocalFirmwareBuildManifest; readonly manifestSha256: string; readonly artifactPath: string; readonly manifestPath: string; readonly importedAt: string; }

VerifiedFirmwareArtifact.sourceSignature: export interface VerifiedFirmwareArtifact { readonly descriptor: number; readonly bytes: Uint8Array; assertStable(): Promise<void>; close(): Promise<void>; }

errors.description: The runtime returned an invalid date.

invariants: Imported timestamps are strict ISO instants.

errors.description: The runtime returned a non-UUID identity.

invariants: UUIDs name only owner-private temporary files.

input.description: The native store plus a native-picker-selected manifest path.

errors.description: Metadata, schema, provenance, vector, embedded identity, size, digest, or create-once checks failed.

invariants: Symlinks are not followed; source files must be current-user-owned and not group/world writable.
Both files are copied create-once into owner-only application storage and reverified.
The published manifest v1 JSON Schema is a syntactic compatibility floor; the runtime validator additionally rejects qualificationEvidenceSha256 unless hardwareQualification is qualified-on-zs407.

input.description: A strict persisted v2 custom target.

output.description: Reopened deterministic app-owned paths that reproduce the target exactly.

errors.description: Stored manifest or artifact no longer reproduces the target.

invariants: No persisted arbitrary path is trusted or reopened.

output.description: Freshly read and reverified firmware bytes for non-write inspection.

errors.description: Content-addressed paths, bytes, or manifest changed.

invariants: Every read repeats structural, size, identity, and digest verification.

input.description: A prior immutable import result selected for the write path.

output.description: Freshly opened exact descriptor, verified bytes, stability assertion, and close capability.

errors.description: Manifest, descriptor metadata, structure, identity, size, digest, or stability check failed.

invariants: The verified bytes and dfu-util inherited descriptor refer to the same open file description; no firmware pathname crosses the child boundary.

input.description: A strictly imported manifest and artifact.

output.description: Content-addressed target identity and immutable provenance.

errors.description: Imported data does not satisfy the runtime target schema.

invariants: Target ID is custom-zs407 plus the artifact SHA-256.
qualificationEvidenceSha256 is copied exactly and required iff hardwareQualification is qualified.

input.description: Strict manifest plus candidate binary bytes.

output.description: Success only after every binary admission check passes.

errors.description: Size, SHA-256, vectors, or embedded identity differs.

invariants: Reset handler is Thumb code inside the image and initial stack is inside STM32F303 SRAM/CCM.
firmware.reportedRevision exactly equals the hexadecimal revision suffix after -g in firmware.version.
